title: Batken heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Batken, with a Z-Score of +3.29. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Batken is characterized by a high CDD of 10.5 GG, indicating a significant energy demand for cooling. 
 The low humidity of 20% and moderate wind speed of 6.5 km/h are exacerbating the heat stress. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, confirming the absence of any cooling needs, while the heat wave persists.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Batken's population and infrastructure.
